pair.ip_placeholder: Leave empty to auto-discover on network
pair.ip_hint: Leave empty to scan automatically. Or enter the IP shown in your router's device list.
pair.serial_hint: Printed on the sticker of the Wi-Fi logger. Detected automatically if blank.

confirm.title: Confirm Inverter Model
confirm.status_no_data: Could not load model data. Press Continue to use auto-detected model.
confirm.hint: Auto-detection reads live registers. If the pre-selected model looks wrong, choose the correct one.
confirm.hint_confident: Detected with high confidence — verify or change below if needed.
confirm.hint_uncertain: Detection uncertain (no live data found). Please select the correct model.

repair.title: Repair Inverter Connection
repair.note: Changing between string and hybrid models requires re-pairing to add or remove devices.
repair.ip_hint: The local IP of your Solarman Wi-Fi logger (port 8899).
